design_fidelity.note: Design layer passes — the case targets the feature_coverage layer specifically.

feature_coverage.missing_feature: export current view to CSV via a download button
feature_coverage.note: Both halves of the hybrid agree the feature is absent; no rubber-stamp override needed.

rationale: The brief lists CSV export as feature #3. The generated app implements the user table and the column sorting cleanly but contains zero references to `export`, `download`, `csv`, `Blob`, or `text/csv`. Stage 1 of `feature_coverage` derives keyword markers [`export`, `download`, …] from the feature label and finds zero hits in the code blob. The LLM judge agrees — the response says `status: missing` for the CSV feature. Cross-validation confirms FAIL with both signals agreeing; `llm_overrides` is 0 because no rubber-stamp prevention was needed.
